title: Add scope-aware display for list and ready
description: When multiple project/ directories are discovered, list and ready output should indicate project path (prefix IDs or group by project). Scoping is based on current directory.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting scope-aware display for list/ready. Plan: inspect current list/ready output, update formatting to include project path prefix when multiple projects discovered, update shared specs + steps, run behavior suites and spec parity.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated list/ready specs for local-only multi-projects, dotfile missing paths, external project paths, and ready --no-local. Added project setup steps for external/local repos, output assertion for external project path, and ready --no-local step. Removed redundant local dir error handling in issue_listing. Tests: cd python && coverage run --source=taskulus -m behave; coverage report -m (100%); cd rust && cargo test --test cucumber; python tools/check_spec_parity.py.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: With multiple project/ directories, tsk list and tsk ready clearly show project path context and match Python/Rust output. Single project output remains unchanged.
